ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the experiment belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the experiment belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the algorithm was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the algorithm was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the algorithm */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the algorithm */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_algorithm" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the algorithm in the experiment */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm used in the experiment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the relationship */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each run */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Population size used in the run */,
  "num_rows" INTEGER /* Number of rows in the run */,
  "num_generations" INTEGER /* Number of generations in the run */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Execution time of the run in milliseconds */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the run */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the run */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the run */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the run fails */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the run */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runs_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the metric */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment or algorithm was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team of the user accessing the experiment or algorithm */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project of the user accessing the experiment or algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the experiment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the algorithm */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_versions_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the parameter */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics_definitions" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the metric definition */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the metric definition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the permission */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was created */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the notification */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
